title: Ethiopian Shiro Stew
description: A comforting and flavorful stew popular in Ethiopia, made with lentils and the country's signature spice blend. Serve with injera bread for a traditional meal.

ingredients.name: lentils
ingredients.notes: red or brown lentils work well

instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add onion, garlic, carrot, and red bell pepper; cook until the vegetables are tender.
Add lentils, shiro, and water to the pot; bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the lentils are tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over injera bread, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
